case_title: MICHAEL FISKE VS. VYSK COMMUNICATIONS INC.,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FISKE, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT VYSK COMMUNICATIONS INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
